design_philosophy.vibe: Hangat dan mewah (Warm and luxurious), boutique, editorial.
design_philosophy.browser_behavior: Must feel like a premium high-end landing page on web/desktop, not a stretched mobile app container.
design_philosophy.core_strategy: Use generous white space, soft contrast, and elegant typography to build trust.

typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' variant: Elegant Serif Headings paired with a Sterile/Clean Sans Body.

headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for large headings. Keep weights Light (300) to Regular (400) for elegance. Avoid Heavy/Black weights.

body.usage_rules: Clean sans-serif for legibility in booking forms and UI labels. Use text-base to text-lg with relaxed line height (leading-relaxed).

spacing_and_layout.general: Embrace negative space. Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) around main content areas.

web_landing_page.hero: Full width with max-w-7xl content constraint. Desktop uses grid-cols-2 for an asymmetric editorial look. Image takes up one column, text the other.
web_landing_page.vendor_grid: Use bento grid or asymmetrical grid on desktop (e.g., md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with gap-8 or gap-12.

mobile_app.container: Standard safe area views, but avoid boxing everything in cards. Use edge-to-edge imagery where possible.

copywriting_indonesian.tone: Natural, human, elegant, and warm. Avoid literal translations.

mapping.Name: Nama Lengkap
mapping.Hero Subtitle: Temukan vendor dekorasi dan lokasi terbaik yang merangkai cerita cinta Anda dengan keanggunan abadi.

cards.style: Go cardless or use extremely subtle borders (border border-border) without harsh shadows. Use soft image corners (rounded-xl) and place text below or layered elegantly over the image with a subtle gradient.
cards.interaction: Subtle scale down or up on press (mobile) or hover (web).

buttons.primary: Background primary (Mocha #8B7355), text surface (#FFFFFF), fully rounded or very slight rounded (rounded-sm) based on preference, padding y-4 px-8.

inputs.style: Editorial style: use border-b only (underlined input), not a full bounding box. Focus states should highlight the bottom border in Mocha. Background transparent.

date_picker.grid: Clean grid, no harsh borders between days.
date_picker.booked: Text text_muted/50 with a subtle strike-through or opacity reduction. Non-selectable.
date_picker.selected: Circular background in Mocha (#8B7355), text White.

home.web_structure: 1. Hero Section (Split layout: Text on Left, large aesthetic image on Right). 2. Trust/Vibe Bar (3 icons: Elegance, Transparent, Easy). 3. Vendor Collection (Grid view).
home.mobile_structure: 1. Stacked Hero (Image top, text overlapping or below). 2. List view for vendors with large edge-to-edge images.

vendor_detail.layout: Large hero image header (max-h-[60vh] on web, 40vh on mobile). Content pushed up to overlap the image slightly. Fixed bottom bar or floating sticky CTA for 'Cek Ketersediaan' on mobile, side panel on web.

booking_form.layout: Clean, distraction-free. Centered narrow container on web (max-w-2xl). Underlined inputs. Custom date picker prominent.

success.layout: Minimalist center-aligned content. Large elegant checkmark or abstract shape. Warm congratulatory text.

media.instructions: Use these exact URLs for placing images. DO NOT use placeholders.

images.description: Elegant outdoor dinner table setup, warm lighting.
Benches on a hill for an outdoor venue.
Luxurious wedding stage adorned with floral arrangements.

technical_notes_for_agent: This is a pure JS Expo NativeWind project. Share guidelines and write code for .js files, NOT .tsx.
Use standard React Native components (<View>, <Text>, <Image>, <Pressable>, <TextInput>) paired with className via NativeWind.
Include 'data-testid' on interactive elements for automated testing (e.g., data-testid='submit-booking-button').
To achieve the web landing page feel, use responsive Tailwind prefixes extensively (e.g., flex-col md:flex-row, px-4 md:px-12).
Ensure the Date Picker logic visually separates 'Available' and 'Booked' correctly using the color palette provided.
